framework.name: D-maerket Digital Trust Label
framework.scope: Voluntary digital trust certification for organizations demonstrating responsible digital practices in Denmark
framework.structure_description: Three pillars: IT-sikkerhed (IT security), Databeskyttelse (Data protection), and Ansvarlighed (Responsibility). Each pillar contains certification criteria.

controls.title: Security management and governance
controls.description: The organization must have a formal security management structure with clearly defined roles and responsibilities.
controls.description_nl: Organisationen skal have en formel sikkerhedsledelsesstruktur med klart definerede roller og ansvar.

controls.title: Security policy
controls.description: The organization must have a documented and approved security policy communicated to all employees.
controls.description_nl: Organisationen skal have en dokumenteret og godkendt sikkerhedspolitik der kommunikeres til alle medarbejdere.

controls.title: Risk assessment of IT systems
controls.description: The organization must conduct regular risk assessments of its IT systems and data.
controls.description_nl: Organisationen skal gennemfore regelmaeessige risikovurderinger af sine IT-systemer og data.

controls.title: Access control and authentication
controls.description: Access to systems and data must be managed with appropriate authentication mechanisms including multi-factor.
controls.description_nl: Adgang til systemer og data skal styres med passende autentifikationsmekanismer inklusiv flerfaktor.

controls.title: Privileged access management
controls.description: Privileged accounts must be managed separately with ongoing monitoring and regular review.
controls.description_nl: Privilegerede konti skal styres saerskilt med loebende overvagning og regelmaeessig gennemgang.

controls.title: Encryption of personal data
controls.description: Personal data must be encrypted both in transit and at rest.
controls.description_nl: Persondata skal krypteres bade under overforsel og ved opbevaring.

controls.title: Vulnerability management and patching
controls.description: The organization must have a process for identifying and remedying technical vulnerabilities.
controls.description_nl: Organisationen skal have en proces for identificering og udbedring af tekniske sarbarheder.

controls.title: Backup and recovery
controls.description: The organization must have a backup strategy with regular testing of recovery procedures.
controls.description_nl: Organisationen skal have en backup-strategi med regelmaeessig test af gendannelsesprocedurer.

controls.title: Incident handling and response
controls.description: The organization must have documented procedures for handling security incidents including escalation.
controls.description_nl: Organisationen skal have dokumenterede procedurer for handtering af sikkerhedshaendelser inklusiv eskalering.

controls.title: Monitoring and detection
controls.description: The organization must have systems for monitoring and detection of security incidents.
controls.description_nl: Organisationen skal have systemer til overvagning og detektion af sikkerhedshaendelser.

controls.title: Security testing
controls.description: Critical systems must undergo regular security testing and penetration testing.
controls.description_nl: Kritiske systemer skal underkastes regelmaeessig sikkerhedstest og penetrationstest.

controls.title: Supplier security
controls.description: The organization must set security requirements for suppliers and monitor their compliance.
controls.description_nl: Organisationen skal stille sikkerhedskrav til leverandoerer og overvage deres overholdelse.

controls.title: Data protection organization
controls.description: The organization must have a Data Protection Officer (DPO) or equivalent function.
controls.description_nl: Organisationen skal have en databeskyttelsesraadgiver (DPO) eller tilsvarende funktion.

controls.title: Record of processing activities
controls.description: The organization must maintain a record of all processing of personal data.
controls.description_nl: Organisationen skal vedligeholde en fortegnelse over alle behandlinger af personoplysninger.

controls.title: Handling data subject rights
controls.description: The organization must have procedures for handling data subject rights: access, deletion, data portability.
controls.description_nl: Organisationen skal have procedurer for haandtering af registreredes rettigheder: indsigt, sletning, dataportabilitet.

controls.title: Consent management
controls.description: Consent must be obtained in a clear and unambiguous manner with the possibility of easy withdrawal.
controls.description_nl: Samtykke skal indhentes pa en klar og utvetydig made med mulighed for nem tilbagetrekning.

controls.title: Handling data breaches
controls.description: The organization must have procedures for handling data breaches including notification to the DPA within 72 hours.
controls.description_nl: Organisationen skal have procedurer for haandtering af databrud inklusiv anmeldelse til Datatilsynet inden 72 timer.

controls.title: Data protection impact assessment (DPIA)
controls.description: The organization must conduct impact assessments for processing likely to result in high risk.
controls.description_nl: Organisationen skal gennemfore konsekvensanalyser for behandlinger der sandsynligvis indebaaerer hoej risiko.

controls.title: Transfer to third countries
controls.description: Transfer of personal data to third countries must comply with GDPR Chapter V requirements.
controls.description_nl: Overforsel af personoplysninger til tredjelande skal overholde GDPR kapitel V-kravene.

controls.title: Transparency about data practices
controls.description: The organization must be transparent about its data practices to users and customers in clear and understandable language.
controls.description_nl: Organisationen skal vaere gennemsigtig om sin datapraksis over for brugere og kunder pa et klart og forstaaeligt sprog.

controls.title: Transparency about AI usage
controls.description: The organization must inform users when AI is used for decision-making that affects them.
controls.description_nl: Organisationen skal informere brugere nar AI anvendes til beslutningstagning der paavirker dem.

controls.title: Ethical use of data
controls.description: The organization must have guidelines for ethical use of data that go beyond legal requirements.
controls.description_nl: Organisationen skal have retningslinjer for etisk brug af data der gar ud over lovkrav.

controls.title: Responsible use of AI
controls.description: The organization must ensure that AI systems are used responsibly with regard to fairness and bias.
controls.description_nl: Organisationen skal sikre, at AI-systemer bruges ansvarligt med hensyntagen til retfaerdighed og bias.

controls.title: Protection of children data
controls.description: The organization must have special measures for the protection of children personal data.
controls.description_nl: Organisationen skal have saerlige foranstaltninger til beskyttelse af boerns personoplysninger.

controls.title: Digital sustainability
controls.description: The organization must consider digital sustainability, including energy consumption and electronic waste.
controls.description_nl: Organisationen skal taege hensyn til digital baeeredygtighed, herunder energiforbrug og elektronisk affald.

controls.title: Complaint handling
controls.description: The organization must have an accessible complaint process for privacy and security inquiries.
controls.description_nl: Organisationen skal have en tilgaeengelig klageproces for privatlivs- og sikkerhedsmaessige henvendelser.

controls.title: Responsible supplier management
controls.description: The organization must assess suppliers digital responsibility as part of supplier management.
controls.description_nl: Organisationen skal vurdere leverandoerers digitale ansvarlighed som del af leverandorstyringen.

metadata.source: D-maerket certification criteria (compiled from published criteria)
